name: Tuna and Caviar Parfait
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces fresh ahi tuna, finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a well chilled bowl, mix the tuna, Tabasco pepper sauce, chives, olive oil, and salt and pepper together.
2. In a parfait glass, alternate layers of tuna mixture, wasabi tobiko and osetra caviar.
3. Top with whipped cream and two chives.
Yield: 4 appetizer servings
